summary: Documentary footage of Trump's formal arrival ceremony at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing: he stands on a red ceremonial dais and salutes as a Chinese military honor guard band plays the U.S. national anthem and children wave flags. The audio is a live ceremonial anthem at a real diplomatic event, captured in static wide shots, not a produced soundtrack or stylized music-video edit, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: No on-screen text of note (live arrival ceremony, Great Hall of the People, Beijing)
